summary: Create M2 30 District/10 Settlement world fixture and seasonal curves
acceptance_criteria: A valid M2 fixture compiles to a runtime content pack with exactly 30 District definitions and 10 Settlement definitions using stable IDs and explicit schemas.

The fixture includes regional seasonal curves sufficient for later monsoon, agriculture, river, and road behavior tests, with deterministic ordering and integer/fixed-point values where rules will consume them.
District, settlement, regional curve, route endpoint, and map-geometry references are validated at compile time; runtime lookup by display name is not introduced.
The fixture follows M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001 and remains prototype fixture data, not formal historical map content.
Repeated compiles of the same source produce the same manifest hash and runtime pack ordering.
No sim-core economy, route-planning, UI, Electron, or product-scope implementation is performed in this task.
required_tests: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M2-WORLD-FIXTURE-001 and new fixture manifests
notes: This is the first implementation-sized M2 data task and should not add economy, population, route choice, UI, or formal historical content.
If source-policy ambiguity blocks fixture authoring, route back to historical_researcher before continuing.
